name: Flaming Sack
title: Improvised Enhancement

abilities.name: Plink!
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may discard this upgrade to reduce the damage by 1.

abilities.name: Steady Blow
abilities.text: When this model removes an Impact token, it deals +2 damage instead of +1.

abilities.name: Flame Splat
abilities.text: If this action receives a raise, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (X)2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token. Then, discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: This is an Upgrade card, not a model stat card - no faction icon, stats, health bar, or characteristics/keywords visible on this card
